title: Goal
description: A goal, objective, or initiative tracked in the big-picture coordination loop. Goals connect plans to progress across teams, keeping entire organizations aligned on what matters.

description.description: Context about what this goal is and why it matters. Leading with context enables autonomous teams.

owner_id.description: ID of the person responsible for this goal.

team_ids.description: IDs of teams working toward this goal.

contributor_ids.description: IDs of people working toward this goal.

agent_contributor_ids.description: IDs of agents working toward this goal.

parent_id.description: ID of the parent goal, enabling nested goal hierarchies (e.g. company objective > team goal > key result).

created_at.description: Timestamp when this goal was created (ISO 8601).
